prompt: Create a photorealistic wide-angle street photo of a modern coach bus driving through a bright downtown business district, shown in full side profile from the left with slight motion blur on the road and background. The bus has a glossy full-body wrap advertisement in a pastel pop-star fan campaign style: a pink rear half blending into a turquoise front half, black tinted windows, turquoise front mirrors, and a pink roofline. The wrap contains exactly 1 large female celebrity portrait centered on the side of the bus, with long dark hair, a white sleeveless top, and the face intentionally covered by a soft rectangular blur for privacy. Add exactly 2 large hand-painted white script text phrases on the bus: “Welcome Back” on the rear pink section and “CHAse” on the turquoise front section. Add exactly 2 small heart graphics: one small pink heart above the left slogan and one small outlined pink heart next to the right name. The bus should be traveling on a multi-lane city road with white lane markings, glass office towers, trees, pedestrians, and urban signage in the background, all slightly blurred from speed. Use realistic daylight, crisp reflections, natural shadows, and the look of a real Korean-style bus wrapping advertisement photo posted on social media. Avoid extra text, logos, watermarks, or additional vehicles blocking the bus.
